mission.title: atlantis: Support installation as a GitHub App
mission.description: Support installation as a GitHub App. Requested by 25+ users.

steps.title: Check current atlantis deployment
steps.description:
Verify your atlantis version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
helm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working atlantis installation.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
Currently, Atlantis can be installed on GitHub by separately:
1. Creating a CI user
1. Configuring a personal access token
1.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support installation as a GitHub App
steps.description:
Maybe there's something we can do about https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/418 ? Opening this PR for visibility, hoping to get some feedback on the approach, I'm happy to change directions if someone's got a better idea in mind!

---

This PR relies on https://github.com/bradleyfalzon/ghinstallation and their dependencies, which might not be fine. At this point its very incomplete, but basically my approach was to expose a few more config values to pass: a github app id, app

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support installation as a GitHub App" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Maybe there's something we can do about https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/418 ? Opening this PR for visibility, hoping to get some feedback on the approach, I'm happy to change directions if someone's got a better idea in mind!

---

This PR relies on https://github.com/bradleyfalzon/ghinstallation and their dependencies, which might not be fine.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible.
